title: Other legal servitudes.
doc_html:
Art. 672.  Other legal servitudes.

Other legal servitudes relate to common enclosures, such as common walls, fences and ditches, and to the right of passage for the benefit of enclosed estates.

Acts 1977, No. 514, §1.
